title: Text Risk Scoring Service - Enforcement Output Contract v4
description: JSON schema for the signals sent downstream to InsightBridge. Guarantees deterministic risk scoring, complete traceability, and absolute non-authority.

enforcement_signal_id.description: Unique, deterministic identifier for this enforcement signal computation.

risk_score.description: The deterministically computed and bounded risk score.

bounded_confidence.description: The deterministically clipped confidence score, downgraded under ambiguity or entropy.

contradiction_flag.description: True if internal contradictions were detected in the upstream intelligence. Does not inflate the risk score.

abstention_flag.description: True if upstream uncertainty forced an epistemic abstention. If True, risk_score MUST be 0.0.

epistemic_source_hash.description: Unmodified passthrough hash of the intelligence material used to generate this assessment.

decision.description: STRICT INVARIANT: The scoring service NEVER makes a decision downstream.

authority.description: STRICT INVARIANT: The scoring service claims NO authority to act on this signal.
